description.zh: 南山最佳日出机位合集。按公园分组，包含方位、登山耗时、海拔、季节建议。
description.en: Best sunrise spots in Nanshan, grouped by park.

why.zh: 深圳湾最经典日出机位，地铁可达，无登山
why.en: Classic bayside spot, metro accessible, no hiking

why.zh: 山顶 360° 视野，约 40 分钟登山
why.en: Summit 360° view, ~40 min hike

why.zh: 半山观景点，约 40 分钟，面向东北
why.en: Mid-mountain, ~40 min, facing NE

why.zh: 前海天际线日出，平地亲水步道
why.en: Qianhai skyline sunrise, flat promenade

why.zh: 📍 红树林保护区核心区，从生态展厅旁进入木栈道。日出鸟群最活跃，11月-3月候鸟季可看黑脸琵鹭。需在深圳湾公园公众号预约。
why.en: 📍 Core reserve area from Eco Exhibition Hall. Dawn bird activity peak, Nov-Mar migration season.

why.zh: 📍 被茂密荔枝林环绕的开放式健身广场。老南头街坊每天早上聚集在这里打太极、慢跑，夏天有树荫非常舒适。
why.en: 📍 Open fitness plaza surrounded by lychee grove. Local Nantou residents' tai chi & jogging spot.

why.zh: 📍 古树参天的广场，晨光穿过树叶打在铜像上很美。适合慢跑热身。
why.en: Ancient tree canopy, morning light through leaves on the statue is beautiful. Good for warm-up jog.

why.zh: 📍 开园时人最少，进入雨林迷宫和热带植物区。蒸汽缭绕、鸟鸣声声，像进入了另一个世界。需购票入内。
why.en: 📍 Best at opening — rainforest maze entrance most atmospheric. Ticket required.

why.zh: 📍 本地钓友的日出据点。月牙形海湾遮挡光线，金光洒在水面的画面很美。适合带鱼竿和咖啡来发呆。
why.en: 📍 Local anglers' sunrise spot. Crescent bay creates framed golden light on water.

why.zh: 📍 从湿地生态展厅旁进入木栈道，穿梭在芦苇和红树林之间。清晨鸟类最活跃。需在「华侨城湿地公园」微信公众号预约入内。
why.en: 📍 Wooden boardwalk from Eco Exhibition Hall through reeds & mangroves. WeChat reservation required.

why.zh: 📍 人才公园的标志性星光跑道，清晨湖面平静倒映前海天际线。跑步体验一流。
why.en: 📍 Signature starlight running track. Calm morning lake reflects Qianhai skyline.

why.zh: 📍 南山最高峰（430米）的「极目阁」观景台。360° 全景，日出云海翻涌非常壮观。登山约 1.5 小时（龙珠大道登山口），途经青云台。
why.en: 📍 Nanshan's highest point (430m). 360° views, sea of clouds at sunrise. ~1.5h from Longzhu Ave.

description.zh: 南山最佳日落机位合集。含开车可达和需登山两类。
description.en: Best sunset spots in Nanshan, drive-up and hike-up options.

why.zh: 蛇口日落天花板，极目阁 360° 无遮挡
why.en: Ultimate Shekou sunset — Jimu Pavilion 360°

why.zh: 深圳湾运动公园观海长廊，退潮最美
why.en: Sports Park promenade, best at low tide

why.zh: 前海石广场，日落映深圳湾大桥
why.en: Qianhai Stone Plaza, Bay Bridge silhouette

why.zh: 演艺公园大草坪，铺野餐垫看日落
why.en: Performance Park lawn, picnic-blanket sunset

why.zh: 📍 栈道最西端靠近深圳河口。退潮时滩涂露出，弹涂鱼和招潮蟹在夕阳下非常有趣。注意查潮汐表。
why.en: 📍 Westernmost end near river mouth. Low tide mudflat wildlife at sunset.

why.zh: 📍 山腰处「齐天亭」，面向前海和蛇口方向。不需登顶就能看到的日落机位，约登山 25 分钟。正对前海湾方向，夏天光晕特别壮观。
why.en: 📍 Mid-mountain Qitian Pavilion facing Qianhai & Shekou. ~25min no summit needed.

why.zh: 📍 明华轮（退役游轮）旁边的海滨栈道。船体剪影配上落日非常出片。看完日落可以直接去海上世界周边餐厅吃饭。
why.en: 📍 Promenade beside Minghua (retired cruise ship). Ship silhouette + sunset is photogenic.

why.zh: 📍 面向前海天际线的湖畔亲水区域。落日映在湖面上，周末有音乐喷泉灯光秀。
why.en: 📍 Lakeside platform facing Qianhai skyline. Sunset reflects on water. Weekend fountain shows.

why.zh: 📍 不需登顶的日落好位置。约 30 分钟到达，面向西南方，适合体能一般的游客。可以看到深圳湾和前海的夜景亮灯过程。
why.en: 📍 Great sunset view without summiting. ~30min from trailhead, facing SW.

description.zh: 按公园列出主要跑步路线，附里程、坡度、路面类型。
description.en: Running routes per park — distance, elevation, surface type.

why.zh: 海边塑胶跑道，平坦海风，最受欢迎
why.en: Rubber track by the sea, flat, most popular

why.zh: 红树林木栈道，清晨鸟鸣空气好
why.en: Boardwalk through mangrove, dawn birdsong

why.zh: 主环线 5km 爬升 280m，适合有经验跑者
why.en: 5km loop +280m, experienced runners only

why.zh: 深圳经典越野跑训练路线
why.en: Classic Shenzhen trail running route

why.zh: 📍 围绕前海石公园人工湖的环形跑道，约 1.5km。路面平整，夜景灯光一流。
why.en: ~1.5km loop around artificial lake. Smooth surface, excellent night lighting.

why.zh: 📍 环绕健身广场的塑胶跑道，约 800m 一圈。树荫覆盖率高，夏天跑步也不晒。
why.en: ~800m rubber track around fitness plaza. Heavy tree cover — shaded even in summer.

why.zh: 📍 绕公园人工湖的环形步道，约 2km。古树成荫，环境幽静。
why.en: ~2km loop around the lake. Mature trees provide shade throughout.

why.zh: 📍 沿月牙形海湾的短距离步道，约 800m。安静祥和，适合独自冥想式跑步。
why.en: ~800m crescent bay loop. Quiet and meditative running.

why.zh: 📍 围绕湿地的木栈道环路，约 3km。完全平坦，穿行芦苇荡中，非常宁静治愈。
why.en: ~3km boardwalk loop around wetland. Completely flat, through reed beds. Peaceful and healing.

why.zh: 📍 环湖塑胶跑道，全长 2.5km，是深圳跑友公认的优质跑步路线之一。
why.en: 📍 2.5km rubber lake loop — one of Shenzhen's top-rated running routes.

why.zh: 📍 经典越野跑训练线路，龙珠大道登山口至山顶约 6km，累计爬升 430m。路况原始，需越野跑经验。
why.en: 📍 Classic trail run route. Longzhu trailhead to summit ~6km, 430m gain. Primitive terrain needs experience.

description.zh: 分两类：公园内短程骑行 + 跨公园长距离绿道。
description.en: Two types: in-park short rides, and long cross-park greenways.

description.zh: 公园配套骑行设施，适合轻松骑行和带娃
description.en: In-park cycling facilities, casual & family rides

why.zh: 前海湾滨水绿道，崭新路面
why.en: Qianhai Bay waterfront greenway, brand-new

why.zh: 演艺公园环线，连接前海石
why.en: Performance Park loop, connects to Qianhai Stone

why.zh: 📍 从红树林海滨生态公园出发沿深圳湾北侧向东到大桥。全长 13km 专用绿道，全程平坦无坡度，适合各类车型。
why.en: 📍 From Mangrove Eco Park eastward to Bay Bridge. ~13km dedicated flat greenway.

why.zh: 📍 公园内部的短距离平坦步道，适合带小孩练习骑车和饭后散步。周末人少安静，荔枝林环绕环境清幽。
why.en: 📍 Short flat internal path, great for kids learning to ride. Quiet even on weekends.

why.zh: 📍 连接蛇口片区的短距离亲水步道。路面较窄但风景好，适合休闲骑行和傍晚散步。月牙形海湾景色独特。
why.en: 📍 Short waterfront path connecting to Shekou. Narrow but scenic, good for casual rides.

why.zh: 📍 沿明华轮周边的海滨步道骑行。可以看到明华轮、渔港和远处香港的夜景。傍晚出发，夜骑体验一流。
why.en: 📍 Waterside ride around Minghua Ship area. Views of ship, fishing port, and HK at night.

why.zh: 📍 专业跑道绕湖一圈约 2.5 公里。路面平整，晚上有灯光，夜骑也安全。
why.en: 📍 Professional track ~2.5km lake loop. Lit at night, safe evening rides.

description.zh: 南山目前只有深圳湾一条真正意义上的跨公园骑行线路
description.en: Only one real cross-park cycling route exists in Nanshan

why.zh: 全程专用绿道，平坦无坡度，跨越红树林和深圳湾公园
why.en: Dedicated greenway, flat, crosses Mangrove and Bay Park

entries.data_source: OpenStreetMap cycleway tags + 公开报道

source_notes: 日出/日落/跑步的 POI tip 文案来自 v9（原始来源：LLM 生成，未经实地核验），POI 坐标为近似值
骑行轨迹为 OpenStreetMap cycleway/footway tags，数据版本 2026-04-20
crowd 时段模式为基于文字描述启发式生成，confidence=low，非实时观测
